name: add_react_native_navigation
avoid: do not use react-navigation v5 patterns if on v6+
brief_template:
To add navigation in React Native:
1. Install deps: '@react-navigation/native' + stack/native-stack
2. Create src/navigation/AppNavigator.tsx with NavigationContainer
3. Define screen types in src/navigation/types.ts
4. Register screens in navigator component
5. Wrap app entry point with NavigationContainer
6. Handle deep linking config if needed
